Bash(cd "E:/GenAI_Antigravity_Projects/02_Active_Projects/Portfolio_Optimizer/src" && "E:/GenAI_Antigravity_Projects/02_Active_Projects/Portfolio_Optimizer/venv/Scripts/python.exe" -X utf8 -c "
import market_data, metrics

tickers = ['GIBLX','DODLX','FSMDX','RNWGX','CSMVX','UBVFX','FNCMX','TRGLX','WFSPX','BISRX']
print\('Fetching metadata...'\)
meta = market_data.fetch_ticker_metadata\(tickers\)

results = []
for ticker in tickers:
    d = meta.get\(ticker, {}\)
    er = d.get\('expense_ratio_pct'\)
    name = d.get\('name', ticker\)
    yld = d.get\('yield', 0.0\) or 0.0
    r1  = d.get\('1y_return', 0.0\) or 0.0
    r3  = d.get\('3y_return', 0.0\) or 0.0
    r5  = d.get\('5y_return', 0.0\) or 0.0

    sharpe = metrics.compute_sharpe_ratio\(ticker, '5y'\)
    nof    = metrics.compute_net_of_fees_return\(ticker, '5y'\)
    te     = metrics.compute_tracking_error\(ticker, period='5y'\)
    hist_days = metrics.get_history_days\(ticker\)

    nof_v  = nof or 0.0
    shr_v  = sharpe or 0.0
    te_v   = max\(0, 1 - \(te * 10\)\) if te is not None else 0.5
    score  = \(nof_v * 35\) + \(shr_v * 35\) + \(te_v * 10\)

    results.append\({
        'ticker': ticker, 'name': name, 'er': er,
        'sharpe': sharpe, 'nof': nof, 'te': te,
        'r1': r1, 'r3': r3, 'r5': r5,
        'score': score, 'hist_days': hist_days
    }\)

results.sort\(key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True\)

print\(f\\"\\n{'Rank':<5}{'Ticker':<8}{'Score':>7}  {'Sharpe':>7}  {'Net5Y':>7}  {'ER':>6}  {'1Y':>7}  {'5Y':>7}  {'Hist':>6}  Name\\"\)
print\('-'*110\)
for i, r in enumerate\(results, 1\):
    sharpe_s = f\\"{r['sharpe']:.3f}\\" if r['sharpe'] else 'N/A'
    nof_s    = f\\"{r['nof']*100:+.2f}%\\" if r['nof'] else 'N/A'
    er_s     = f\\"{r['er']:.3f}%\\" if r['er'] is not None else 'N/A'
    r1_s     = f\\"{r['r1']*100:+.2f}%\\"
    r5_s     = f\\"{r['r5']*100:+.2f}%\\"
    hist_s   = f\\"{r['hist_days']}d\\" if r['hist_days'] else '?'
    print\(f\\"{i:<5}{r['ticker']:<8}{r['score']:>7.2f}  {sharpe_s:>7}  {nof_s:>7}  {er_s:>6}  {r1_s:>7}  {r5_s:>7}  {hist_s:>6}  {r['name'][:45]}\\"\)
" 2>&1)
